verification_notes: All 6 acceptance assertions for section-1 confirmed: S1.A1 scoreHand totals/isSoft correct on canonical cases; S1.A2 isBlackjack only on 2-card 21 and isBust on >21; S1.A3 legalActions includes h/s/d/p on initial pair, only h/s after hit, double allowed on split sub-hand 2-card decision, surrender never present; S1.A4 playDealer S17 verified for soft 17 and hard 16; S1.A5 resolveHand returns netDelta=15 on bet=10 player blackjack; S1.A6 module is pure ES module without any DOM references (grep clean for 'window', 'document'). Contract matches section-1--section-3.json signatures.
rationale: Sub-goals 1a/1b/1c collapsed into a single builder dispatch (builder-1abc) because the three pieces share the same module file under ES module conventions and the consolidated unit was small enough to verify holistically.
